title: fix(deps): update module github.com/docker/docker to v24

comments.body:
```
# github.com/containers/podman/v4/pkg/api/handlers/compat
pkg/api/handlers/compat/info.go:65:4: unknown field ClusterAdvertise in struct literal of type "github.com/docker/docker/api/types".Info
pkg/api/handlers/compat/info.go:66:4: unknown field ClusterStore in struct literal of type "github.com/docker/docker/api/types".Info
```
Breaking change.  Needs to fixed in Podman.

> Breaking change. Needs to fixed in Podman.

Done :heavy_check_mark: The two removed fields had already been deprecated.
